codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failed review, prior synthesis, active-branch reachability, and commit diff for 63eb0bd9. The commit is present on the active branch, restores DeepSeek-specific model-listing tests in current HEAD, covers synthetic OpenAI-compatible config/auth/registry registration, prefix/force-prefix semantics, disabled/empty/credentialless/removed negatives, no static deepseek-v4 default, non-DeepSeek providers with DeepSeek-looking upstream names, and parsed authenticated /v1/models JSON assertions. The added credential usability guard is narrow to OpenAI-compatible model registration and is covered by the new credentialless/header-credential tests.

summary: Pass: the fix adequately addresses the prior blocker that current HEAD lacked DeepSeek-specific model-listing tests. Evidence reviewed includes sdk/cliproxy/deepseek_model_listing_test.go, internal/api/server_test.go, sdk/cliproxy/service.go, the handoff/transcript skeleton, and commit reachability showing 63eb0bd9 is an ancestor of HEAD.
